basic_info.title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
basic_info.review: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is widely considered one of the greatest RPGs ever made, featuring an expansive open world, compelling narrative, and meaningful player choices that shape the story.

alternative_names: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt - Complete Edition

play_today.details: The Complete Edition with Next-Gen update featuring ray tracing, improved textures, faster loading times, and DualSense haptic feedback support. Considered the definitive console version.

recommended_patches.name: Next-Gen Update
recommended_patches.description: Official update adding ray tracing, improved visuals, and performance modes

play_today.details: Complete Edition with Next-Gen enhancements including 4K resolution options, ray tracing support, and optimized performance. Xbox Game Pass available.

recommended_patches.name: Next-Gen Update
recommended_patches.description: Official update adding ray tracing and visual improvements

play_today.details: PC version with extensive modding support. Best experience achieved with HD Reworked Project and performance patches for optimal stability.

recommended_patches.name: HD Reworked Project NextGen Edition
recommended_patches.description: Comprehensive visual overhaul improving textures, models, and assets for next-gen PC version

recommended_patches.name: Script Merger Tool
recommended_patches.description: Essential modding tool to prevent conflicts between multiple mods

recommended_patches.description: Addresses stuttering and DX12 renderer issues for smoother gameplay

play_today.details: Portable version with reduced resolution but complete content including all DLC. Good for on-the-go play despite performance limitations.

description.synopsis: Geralt of Rivia, a professional monster hunter, searches for his adopted daughter Ciri while navigating political conflicts and supernatural threats in the war-torn Continent.
key_features: Massive open world with hundreds of quests
Meaningful player choices affecting story outcomes
Complex combat system with signs, swords, and alchemy
Two major expansions: Hearts of Stone & Blood and Wine
Multiple endings based on decisions throughout the game
description.long_description: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt, developed by CD Projekt Red, is widely regarded as one of the greatest RPGs ever created. Released in May 2015, it follows Geralt of Rivia searching for his adopted daughter Ciri while uncovering a conspiracy involving the Wild Hunt. The game features an expansive open world spanning multiple regions, hundreds of quests (both main and side), and a narrative system where player choices have lasting consequences. The Complete Edition/Next-Gen update (December 2022) added ray tracing, improved textures, faster loading times, and performance optimizations for modern platforms. With over 130 hours of gameplay for the base game alone, plus two massive expansions that add hundreds more hours, it remains a benchmark for open-world RPGs.
legacy_and_impact: Won over 800 Game of the Year awards
Set new standards for open-world RPG design and storytelling
Popularized meaningful choice systems in modern gaming
The Complete Edition became a model for next-gen updates
Continues to receive community mods years after release
